subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured of the signs of God! It is recounted in the sacred traditions that on the Day of Resurrection, the banner of praise shall be uplifted, and the standard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله در روایت است که در یوم قیامت لواء حمد مرتفع گردد و علم
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant
